name: Kai Lenny
overview: This catalogs Kai Lenny's adventures on his Youtube channel. Kai Lenny was born & raised on the island of Maui, Kai is a product of his environment. From the biggest waves in the world to the smallest swells and the strongest winds. It’s all about staying in the water and having fun no matter what the conditions are. 8X SUP World Champion with a passion for competition and innovation. The sky isn’t the limit, space is only the beginning.
